org.deleteBody: This will soft-delete the organization and all its projects, members, and data. It can be restored within 60 days.
org.restoreBody: This will restore the organization and make it active again.
org.deletedBanner: This organization was deleted on {date}. It will be permanently removed on {permanentDate}.

project.deleteBody: This will soft-delete the project and all its data. It can be restored within 60 days.
project.restoreBody: This will restore the project and make it active again.
project.deletedBanner: This project was deleted on {date}. It will be permanently removed on {permanentDate}.

member.alreadyInvited: This email has already been invited
member.removeBody: This will remove the user from the organization and revoke access to all its projects.
member.removeBodyProject: This will remove the user from this project.
member.cannotRemoveOC: The Original Creator cannot be removed
member.inheritedTooltip: This user has access as an org Owner. Manage via org settings.

transfer.initiateBody: This will transfer Original Creator status to the target user. This action is irreversible once accepted.
transfer.acceptBody: You will become the Original Creator of this organization. This action is irreversible.
transfer.targetNotOwner: Target must be an existing Owner of this organization
transfer.infoText: Transferring Original Creator status is irreversible. The target user must already be an Owner of this org. The transfer expires after 7 days if not accepted.
transfer.targetHelp: Must be an existing Owner of this organization.
transfer.targetNotice: You have been selected to become the Original Creator of this organization.

invite.unverifiedWarning: Your email is not verified. You must verify your email before accepting invitations.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.deleteOrgDescription: Permanently removes the org and all its projects, members, and data after a 60-day recovery window.
dangerZone.deleteProjectDescription: Permanently removes the project and all its data after a 60-day recovery window.
